reviews.review_description: i spent $26 dollars getting the power ups then it got removed, give me my money back.

I bought a 26$ size changer and played the game for 1 week then the game got rid of it and I have been missing my money since plus my size changer. but the owner is the nicest guy I have ever met cause I texted him and he was chill about averything when I was texting.

I HIGHLY Recommend you never play this game. The community is so toxic and young the game design is awful and you can’t see anything while playing. note: Also lack of maps.
Hasn’t been updated since 1st of january and its so bad i have to uninstall the game so it don’t clog up space.
Crappy game i don’t recommend it.

developer_response.body: We are sorry to hear your dissatisfaction with the game. The last game update was on the Fourth of July at the time of this response, in which we made it very dark to fit with the nighttime scene and added fireworks to fit with the Fourth of July theme. The reason there aren't many different areas to play in is because the game is still in beta, and soon to be on its full release. If you would like to talk about what might make the game better, feel free to contact us at thunderbusinesscontact@gmail.com. Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description: Needs a moderator due to very inappropriate comments and behavior

developer_response.body: We are sorry for your displeasing experience. There are moderators, but we are helping each other to make a new update that has much better moderation. Thank you for playing!

reviews.review_description: I would like a refund for the size changer, i want a refund because i cannot use the size changer in tag anymore. Can i get a refund please?

developer_response.body: Please email us at thunderbusinesscontact@gmail.com so we can get more information on when you bought it, thanks!

reviews.review_description: There's no planets that we can run on like the moon or even Mars we need giant planets to run on top of or you can make your choice of the environment that you can add like adding continents oceans and animals to the gigantic planets if this message gets 50 👍you must do exactly what this message has told you

developer_response.body: We are sorry for the inconvenience. Please contact us at thunderbusinesscontact@gmail.com to resolve this issue.

reviews.review_description: Bro this game is so bad, the obby just sucks cuz the objects are so darn spaced out!! Every time I do it i always get stuck on those little think wooden blocks! This game sucks!

developer_response.body: We are sorry for your miserable experience! Fortunately, there is an update out now that has easier platforming elements. You might want to try it out again! Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
I love how the tag monkeys can get big but btw you need to buy the size changeing thing but it’s funny because they can put there hand in the slide and it fells like run from seek from doors lol
But very game you better get it plsss
It is better the gorilla tag￼
Are there free mods? Some games I have played have some mods.(like lizard chase)

developer_response.body: There are no mods at this time, however there are powerups. You can receive them by purchasing the powerup support bundle in the shop area. Thanks for the feedback!
